title: infinity-categories-adjunction-triangles widget params
description: Bespoke widget showing the unit/counit triangle identities for an $\infty$-adjunction $F \dashv G$, used in infinity-categories.html §5 (#infty-adjunctions).

widgetId.description: DOM id of the widget host element. Must match the id baked into bodyMarkup.

bodyMarkup.description:
ARTIFACT. Verbatim widget host bytes — the inline `
…
`. Carried through unchanged so the round-trip stays byte-identical.

bodyScript.description: ARTIFACT. Verbatim driving script bytes including the leading newline + `<script>` tag and trailing `</script>`. Carries the IIFE that wires up the widget; preserved byte-for-byte.
